scripts.check: npm run check:py && npm run check:js && npm test
scripts.check:py: PYCACHE_DIR=$(mktemp -d /tmp/ashare-radar-pycache.XXXXXX); trap 'rm -rf "$PYCACHE_DIR"' EXIT; PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=$PYCACHE_DIR PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 ${PYTHON:-/opt/anaconda3/bin/python3} -m compileall -q app tests tools && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 ${PYTHON:-/opt/anaconda3/bin/python3} -m pyflakes app tests tools
scripts.clean:caches: find app tests tools -type d -name __pycache__ -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && rm -rf .pytest_cache
